characters.name: Alejandro
characters.description: AlejandroCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorMint GreenLabelThe Arch VillainEpisode count35 (Total Drama)1 (Total DramaRama)Total Drama World TourTeamTeam ChrisMergeEliminationHawaiian PunchPlacement1st/2ndTotal Drama All-StarsTeamVillainous VulturesMergeEliminationThe Obsta-Kill KoursePlacement6thAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipHeatherCourtney(one-sided attraction on her side, ended)Bridgette(one-sided attraction on her side, ended)Gwen(one-sided attraction on her side, ended)Leshawna(one-sided attraction on her side, ended)Lindsay(one-sided attraction on her side, ended)FriendsHeather,Lindsay(one-sided, on Lindsay's side),Tyler(one-sided, on Tyler's side)EnemiesBridgette, Cameron, Cody, Courtney, DJ, Duncan, Ezekiel, Gwen, Harold, Leshawna, Mike, Noah, Owen, Sam, Scott, Sierra, ZoeyFamilyFather, Mother, Julio (uncle),José,Carlos (older brothers)Voiced byMarco Grazzini(TDA & TDWT)Alex House(TDAS)Keith Oliver (while in theDrama Machine)Alejandro Burromuertowas a contestant, the main antagonist, andone ofthefinalistsofTotal Drama World Tour. He was one of thethreenewcomersto theseriesand a member ofTeam Chris Is Really Really Really Really Hot. He was seen with the original contestants on ayachtin thefirst episodeofTotal Drama: Revenge of the Island. He returned as therobotserving as Chris' assistant, but later became a camper forTotal Drama All-Stars, as a member of theVillainous Vultures. Keith Oliver (while in theDrama Machine) On the surface, Alejandro appears to be a polite, dashing, and charming gentleman, but underneath he is dark and twisted. He is known to use his charm and exceptional persuasion to advance him further in the game. He has proven to be one of the show's deadliest contestants, as the number of eliminations he has caused is rivaled only by that ofHeather. He proudly acknowledges his terrible nature, even viewing himself as worse than Heather, calling her a saint by comparison, and happily acting upon his nasty desires after dropping his nice guy facade. Before, he would do anything to keep up the act just to get further in the game, such as faking kindness to eliminating anyone who could out him when given the opportunity. He generally keeps his cool when someone or something angers him, even taking losing rather well, but snaps when his patience is pushed too far.  He can easily hold a grudge for even themost minor offenseto him and takes pleasure in exacting his revenge on those who wronged him. His manipulative side has been largely toned down inTotal Drama All-Stars, and although it is still present, his better and less malicious side is seen. Despite being one of the crueler contestants, Alejandro can be sincerely nice if he desires to be and draws the line at senseless harm, even being disgusted by Mal's cruelty. He has made it clear his cruelty isn't usually personal with few exceptions, mainly doing so to win. Like the rest of his family, he follows the Burromuerto family code: never hit

He can easily hold a grudge for even themost minor offenseto him and takes pleasure in exacting his revenge on those who wronged him. characters.name: Alligator and Crocodile
characters.description: Alligator and CrocodileColorGreenEye colorYellowAppearancesFirst appearanceSearch and Do Not Destroy(crocodile)I Triple Dog Dare You!(alligator)Last appearanceA Million Ways to Lose a Million Dollars(alligator)Tortoise Rigamortis(crocodile)InteractionsFriendsChris,DJ,Heather,SugarEnemiesBeth,Brody,Courtney,Dakota,Duncan,Eva,Ezekiel,Gwen,Harold,Jasmine,Josee,Julia,Leshawna,Lindsay,Lightning,Mal,Max,Millie,Owen,Priya,Seagull,Shawn,Sky,ZoeyThealligatorandcrocodileare two closely related scaly reptilian animals that have appeared numerous times throughoutTotal Dramaandthe Ridonculous Race. InSearch and Do Not Destroy, the crocodile has its first appearance in this series guarding the key thatLeshawnais looking for to unlock her treasure chest. She managed to fight off three of them and successfully retrieved her key. InI Triple Dog Dare You!, an alligator is once again seen as a part ofNoah's dare, which is "wrestle an alligator." Heather is seen performing the alligator dare.

characters.name: Amy
characters.description: AmyCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBlondeEye colorTealLabelThe Evil TwinEpisode count4Total Drama: Pahkitew IslandTeamPimâpotew KinosewakEliminationTwinning Isn't EverythingPlacement12thAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipRodney(one-sided attraction on his side)EnemiesJasmine,Rodney(one-sided, on her side),SameyFamilySamey(younger twin sister),motherVoiced byBryn McAuleyAmywas a contestant onTotal Drama: Pahkitew Islandas a member of thePimâpotew Kinosewak. Amy is aggressive, cruel, snarky, impatient, arrogant, and will take advantage of anyone if she finds the opportunity. She believes that she is both the "beauty and the brains" between her and her twin and viewsSameyas a "spare Amy", "lesser Amy" or even a "second Amy," and thus the inferior sibling. She also remarks that she will change Samey's name to "Spare-Amy" when she gets home. Having bullied and ridiculed Sammy for years, she is not above abusing her sister, both physically and mentally, without feeling any remorse doing so. Despite her claims of being intellectually superior over her sister, Amy frequently takes credit for her sister's strategies and other accomplishments. She also refuses to take responsibility over her own failures, placing the blame on Samey whenever something goes amiss. She would even go as far as pretending to be the victim while Samey is the bully, making sure no one will ever side with Samey. Amy swimming all the way back toPahkitew Islandafter hereliminationindicates that she is also very determined. She is a member of a cheerleading team with Samey, as evidenced by their uniforms. Amy cruelly kicks her sister off, who was grabbing onto her leg for safety...

characters.name: Anne Maria
characters.description: Anne MariaCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorDark BrownEye colorBlackLabelTheJersey ShoreRejectEpisode count8 (Total Drama)1 (Ridonculous Race)Total Drama: Revenge of the IslandTeamMutant MaggotsEliminationA Mine Is a Terrible Thing to WastePlacement8thAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipEzekiel(one-sided attraction on his side)Vito(broken up)FriendsCameronEnemiesDakota,Ezekiel(one-sided, on her side),Jo,Scott,Staci,ZoeyVoiced byAthena KarkanisAnne Mariawas a camper onTotal Drama: Revenge of the Island, as a member of theMutant Maggots. She also makes a cameo appearance in thefinaleof thespin-off series. 1 (Ridonculous Race) Anne Maria is a rude, aggressive, and sassy girl who is all about the looks. She even admits that while she wants to win the prize money, she will back out if it involves sacrificing her appearance. She is obsessed with herhairsprayand spray tan, keeping the hairspray cans in her pouffe at all times. This accessibility allows her to attack with her hairspray when the matter calls for it. Anne Maria is quite aggressive and will unhesitatingly engage in a fight with anyone who gets on her nerves. Herattraction toVitoindicates that she looks for similar personality traits in a guy. She is very sociable, saying in herbiographythat she would invite everyone to one of her parties. Anne Maria typically isn't her team's most useful asset, although she usually tries and has proven to be otherwise. She is materialistic and has limited mental strength, but she is willing to face a problem head-on so long as she doesn't have to risk ruining her appearance, especially her hair.

characters.name: Axel
characters.description: AxelCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorLight BrownLabelThe Hard CoreEpisode count11Total Drama Island(2023)TeamFerocious TroutEliminationPirates of the Cabbage'anPlacement15thTotal Drama Island(2024)TeamTeam Rat FaceMergeEliminationFun Fight at the O'Cake CorralPlacement10thAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipRipperFriendsRipperEnemiesChase,MKFamilyFour BrothersVoiced byTamara AlmeidaAxelwas a camper onTotal Drama Island(2023)as a member of theFerocious Trout. She returned forTotal Drama Island(2024)as a member ofTeam Rat Face. Axel has a strong belief that the zombie apocalypse is coming and has trained herself to be prepared for when it eventually arrives. She possesses strong leadership qualities and is not hesitant to make sacrifices in instances of mutiny, even if that impliessabotaging her own team. Axel has also shown a frustrated and angry side at times. She embodies an untamed spirit, unafraid to catch wild animals and feed them to her team in hopes of enhancing their strength and improving their chances of winning. InTotal Drama Island (2024), Axel makes an effort to be nicer in order to get further in the game. Aside from still being hostile toRipper, Axel appears to be a lot more caring towards her teammates, such as being concerned forDamienafter he is severely injured. She is also vengeful against those who cross the line, as shown when she is disgusted atMilliepushing Damien down the dangerous four-point slide andMKcheating in the challenges. She even opens up to being in a relationship after Ripper's constant attempts to win her over.

characters.name: B
characters.description: BCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorTealLabelThe Strong, Silent GeniusEpisode count4Total Drama: Revenge of the IslandTeamToxic RatsEliminationIce Ice BabyPlacement12thAdditional InformationInteractionsFriendsDawn,SamEnemiesScott,StaciVoiced byN/ABeverly "B"was a camper onTotal Drama: Revenge of the Island, as a member of theToxic Rats. Due to the fact that he has never spoken, lack of background information, and his relatively short time on the show, very little is actually known about B. One thing that can be deduced is that his intelligence level is through the roof, leading to the production of manyimpressive creationsthroughout his short time on the show. This is especially visible in his audition tape. He is able to make the best of any situation and overall is a very useful asset to one'steam. He comes across as very relaxed in demeanor and takes pride in his brains. The exact reason that B never speaks is currently unknown. On some occasions, he has opened his mouth to speak but gets cut off, such as during his elimination or his audition tape. This suggests that B has no real problem with speech; he just prefers to stay quiet. B makes his debut inBigger! Badder! Brutal-er!

characters.name: Baby seal
characters.description: Baby sealColorWhiteEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceOpening sequence (Total Drama World Tour)Last appearanceIce to Beat YouInteractionsFriendsBear,SasquatchanakwaEnemiesBrody,DJ,Geoff,Izzy,SpudThebaby sealis one of the few animals to debut inTotal Drama World Tour. Seals also appear again inTotal Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Race. In theopening sequence, afterIzzy, dressed in a polar bear costume, scaresLindsayoff, a baby seal then bites Izzy's arm causing her to run away. InAnything Yukon Do, I Can Do Better,DJaccidentally runs into a baby seal after his eyes are frozen shut from crying in the cold, continuing theCurse of the Mummified Dog, which began inWalk Like An Egyptian - Part 1. After he runs into the baby seal, it flies off the cliff and into a freezing cold lake.Leshawnaand Lindsay both lie to DJ, saying that they saw the baby seal climbing up the cliff. Lindsay even makes seal noises to make it more believable. After they leave the scene, the baby seal ends up climbing back up the cliff, glaring at DJ and growling viciously. The baby seal seeks its revenge five episodes later.

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: BearGenderMaleColorBrownEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceNot So Happy Campers—Part 1Last appearanceSoar LosersInteractionsFriendsAlejandro,baby seal,Chris,Dave(one-sided),Ella,Moose,Owen,Sasquatchanakwa,WayneEnemiesAlligators,Cameron,Chase,Cody,Courtney,DJ,Duncan,Emma,Fire-breathing flower,Geoff,Gwen,Harold,Heather,Izzy,Julia,Katie,Max,Millie,MK,Priya,Ripper,Sadie,Sam,Scott,Sky,Squirrels,Sugar,Trent,Tyler Thebearis a large, brown-furred mammal that is very dangerous when angered. It is one of the most feared animals atCamp Wawanakwa. It has made several major appearances inTotal Drama Island, usually scaring the campers. InTotal Drama Action, however, it made fewer appearances since its contract with theshowhad apparently expired. However, it goes on to make further appearances inTotal Drama World Tour,Total Drama: Revenge of the Island, andTotal Drama All-Stars. A robotic bear with a similar appearance namedScuba Bearmakes recurring appearances inTotal Drama: Pahkitew Island. The bear's first appearance is inThe Big Sleep, whenTylerhas a nightmare thatKatieandSadieare being attacked by it. InThe Sucky Outdoors,Owentells a story in which he and his grandpa hunted a giant bear. AfterIzzyhas been gone for a while, a bear enters the Gophers' campsite. Upon seeing the bear, everyone panics, then runs and climbs up a nearby tree. During this moment of fear, Owen reveals that his story was just for entertainment purposes and that he had never really hunted a bear before.Heatherdryly states that the bear probably isn't hungry anymore since it has likely already eaten Izzy, causing her team to look at her in shock. Once the branchLeshawnais on breaks, everyone becomes immediately frightened, and Owen proclaims loudly that she is going to die. However, Leshawna is very surprised when the "bear" asks her if she is okay, and when she asks her fellow campers if the bear just talked to her, it removes its head and reveals itself to be Izzy.

characters.name: Beardo
characters.description: BeardoCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBlackLabelThe Human SoundboardEpisode count1Total Drama: Pahkitew IslandTeamWâneyihtam MaskwakElimination"So, Uh, This Is My Team?"Placement14thAdditional InformationVoiced byClé BennettBeardowas a contestant onTotal Drama: Pahkitew Island, as a member of theWâneyihtam Maskwak. Beardo describes himself as being shy until he becomes comfortable around someone. While friendly, he tends to "just make noises and be generally bothersome." Although it appears that he is completely silent, likeB, he is merely reluctant to talk at first. He is shown to be quite skilled at sound production and has evenproduced his own CD. He hopes that his team can look past his annoying nature and see that he is actually a good person. The opposite occurs, however, and his odd behavior and lack of contribution to his team end up leading to hiseliminationin "So, Uh, This Is My Team?". His audition tape shows that he may have problems socializing and would rather be alone and play music until he feels close to someone, then they can see that he is a better person than he seems to be at first sight. Despite his early elimination, he is shown to have enjoyed his time on the show, as his last words exclaimed that he enjoyed meeting all of his teammates.

characters.name: Beaver
characters.description: BeaverColorBrownEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceThe Big Sleep(Beaver)Up the Creek(Woolly beaver)Last appearanceCarmageddon(Beaver)Lie-Ranosaurus Wrecked(Woolly beaver)InteractionsFriendsChris,IzzyEnemiesCourtney,Geoff,Heather,Owen,Scott,Sky,Zoey,Beth,Cody,Duncan,Gwen,Harold,Leshawna,Lindsay,TrentThebeaveris a furry mammal that inhabitsCamp Wawanakwa. It primarily appears inTotal Drama Islandbut has also made minor appearances inTotal Drama: Revenge of the Island,Total Drama All-Stars,Total Drama: Pahkitew Island, andTotal DramaRama. The beaver is first seen in theopening sequenceforTotal Drama Islandwhen a camera from underground pops up under it; however, the beaver bears a different design from how they appear later in the series. Chris turns to the beaver page in his book in an attempt to make the campers fall asleep inThe Big Sleep.

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: BethCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBlackLabelThe WannabeEpisode count45Total Drama Island(2007)TeamScreaming GophersEliminationIf You Can't Take the Heat...Placement16thTotal Drama ActionTeamKiller GripsMergeEliminationThe Aftermath: IVPlacement1st/2ndAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipBradyHarold(attracted to, ended)Justin(attracted to)FriendsBridgette, Cody, Duncan, Harold, Justin, Leshawna, LindsayEnemiesBlaineley,Courtney,HeatherFamilyMother, FatherVoiced bySarah GadonBethwas a camper inTotal Drama Islandas a member of theScreaming Gophers. She later returned as a castmate inTotal Drama Actionon theKiller Gripsand wasoneof thefinaliststhat season. Despite this, she did not return forTotal Drama World Tourand was instead anaftermath commentator. She was seen with the original cast on ayachtin thefirst episodeofTotal Drama: Revenge of the Island. Beth was born and raised on a farm with only animal friends and her parents to keep her company. Thanks to her background, she never developed proper social skills, even stating that her best friend is actuallyher pet pig, Bertha. She does anything for attention, and while she excels at getting others to stop and stare, it is more often than not for embarrassing reasons. Beth herself remains oblivious to this problem. She also tends to be a very dependent person, most likely caused by her desire for everyone to like her. Her naïve ways make her an ideal target for antagonists likeCourtney,Heather, andJustin. Over time, Beth learns to stand up for herself and stays strong all the way to the end. Overall, Beth is considered to be a sweet and trustworthy girlamong the castwho learns to be strong and independent. Bethcomes off pretty strongin her first impression.

characters.name: Beth (Total DramaRama)
characters.description: Beth (Total DramaRama)Character ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBrownEye colorBlueEpisode count128Additional InformationInteractionsFriendsBridgette,Cody,Courtney,Duncan,Gwen,Harold,Izzy,Jude,Noah,Owen,SugarEnemiesLeshawna(one-sided)FamilyMother, little brother, cousinVoiced bySarah GadonBethis one of the children attendingHappy Tots Daycare Centre. Beth's personality is quite very different from her older counterpart. For example, she is more prone to disgusting behavior, which includes picking her nose, farting, and eating insects. She is more self-centered, obnoxious, and competitive. This is the opposite of the older Beth, who, while socially inept, is a nice girl who is capable of making friends with nearly everyone. However, she does have a good side, such as when Harold starts crying, she tells him she never wanted to be a ninja and lets Harold be the class ninja. InDuck Duck Juice, Beth noticesIzzyandJude's sugar rush. She, along with the other kids, tries to keep them calm untilChef Hatchetcomes back.

characters.name: Bird
characters.description: BirdColorVariousEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceOpening sequenceLast appearanceNone Down, Eighteen to Go - Part 1InteractionsFriendsCourtney,Dawn,DJ,Duncan,Ella,Justin,MalEnemiesCameron,Heather,Intern,Izzy,Jo,Owen,Sierra,Squirrel Thebirdis one of many animals to commonly appear inTotal Drama. It is normally seen flying around or standing on a tree branch watching the contestants while chirping. The bird comes in many different colors including blue, red, pink and orange. The bird is first seen in theintro. Two of them are seen relaxing withDJand several other animals. The moment of peace is disturbed when a dead fish falls from the sky and the animals begin to attack DJ.

characters.name: Blaineley
characters.description: BlaineleyCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBlonde(dyed)Eye colorBlueEpisode count10 (Total Drama)1 (Total Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Race)Total Drama World TourTeamN/AMergeEliminationChinese Fake-OutPlacementTied for 6thAdditional InformationInteractionsFriendsChef Hatchet,JoshEnemiesBeth,Bridgette,Cody,Courtney,Eva,Geoff,Heather,SierraVoiced byCarla CollinsMildred "Blaineley" Stacey Andrews O'Halloranis a television host, formerly ofCelebrity Manhunt, and a co-host forTotal Drama World TourAftermath. She was one of thethreenewcomerswho debuted inTotal Drama World Tourdue to accidentally winning thesecond-chance challengeinAftermath Aftermayhem, and became a contestant on the season after debuting inNiagara Brawls. She also makes cameo appearances in aTotal Drama All-Starsexclusive clip and theseason finaleof thespin-off series. 1 (Total Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Race) Blaineley is obsessed with gossip and fame. She wants more than anything to obtain a "juicy" story and attempts to delve into topics that could potentially cause a scandal. When she first appears inCelebrity Manhunt'sTotal Drama ActionReunion Special, Blaineley is depicted as enthusiastic and friendly; however, her true colors are eventually revealed when she starts hostingTotal Drama'sAftermath show.

characters.name: Bowie
characters.description: BowieCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBlonde(dyed)Eye colorBrownLabelThe Loveable Party BoyEpisode count20Total Drama Island(2023)TeamFrogs of DeathMergeEliminationMagma Cum LaudePlacement2ndTotal Drama Island(2024)TeamTeam Skunk ButtMergeEliminationCanoe Believe It?Placement11thAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipRajCaleb(attracted to, ended)FriendsRaj,WayneEnemiesCaleb, Chase, Emma, Julia, Millie, MK, PriyaVoiced byBrandon Michael ArringtonBowiewas a camper and one of thetwomain antagonists ofTotal Drama Island(2023)as a member of theFrogs of Deathand was the runner-up of the season. He returned forTotal Drama Island(2024)as the team captain ofTeam Skunk Butt. Bowie can be described as both competitive and affable, which sets him apart from most antagonists. While he possesses a strong drive to win, he knows when to put aside his ruthlessness. Despite being naturally competitive, he is sincerely friendly and open to making friends or forming relationships, though he prefers to wait until the season's over so he doesn't hurt them by eventually plotting their elimination. Bowie has trained himself to win the show, and therefore possesses the confidence to believe he will do well. ByTotal Drama Island (2024), he's shown to have changed for the better, likely from having Raj by his side, as he's shown to be much more caring and patient with those around him. However his tactics and strategies from last season had made him a very hated contestant, with his allies being onlyRajandWayne. As if it was not enough, when hisformer team'scheating is discovered byChrisat the beginning of the merge, Julia puts all the blame on him, thus eliminating him early.

characters.name: Brady
characters.description: BradyGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorGreenInteractionsRelationshipBethFriends withBethEnemies withJustin(one-sided on Justin's side)Voiced byDan PetronijevicBradyhas beenBeth'sboyfriendsinceTotal Drama Action. Initially, no one believes her when she claims Brady is her boyfriend, and she even gets to the point of doubting his entire existence. However, he finally makes an appearance in theseason's finaleafter the winner is declared (in both endings), proving that he really does exist and that Beth has been telling the truth the whole time sinceshe first spoke of him. Beth first mentions Brady and shows everyone his modeling portfolio. Brady is first mentioned and seen when Beth shows a picture of him inMasters of Disasters. During the beginning of this episode, as everyone in the craft services tent complains aboutChef'sfood, Beth brings up Brady, saying that he is a professional cook. She constantly tells everyone about Brady's alleged acts and occupation.Izzy,Heather,Justin,Leshawna, andLindsayare the first to jump on this subject as soon as Beth says the word "boyfriend." Heather recalls no talk about Beth having a boyfriend before this. Leshawna notices Beth only saying the word "boyfriend" and not his name, so she then asks her when they met. Beth answers that they met betweenTotal Drama IslandandTotal Drama Action. Lindsay points out that the span between the two seasons was only two days, making it very unlikely she got a boyfriend in that amount of time. Beth claims they met in the orthodontist's office for the same reason: to get their braces off. Beth shows theKiller Gripsa framed photograph of Brady, but her team laughs at her. In the confessional, Izzy jokes that she'll buy anything off of late-night infomercials, but she won't buy that.

characters.name: Brick
characters.description: BrickCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorBlackLabelThe CadetEpisode count8Total Drama: Revenge of the IslandTeamMutant MaggotsToxic RatsEliminationA Mine Is a Terrible Thing to WastePlacement9thAdditional InformationInteractionsFriendsCameron,Dawn,Mike,Sam,ZoeyEnemiesJoFamilyMotherVoiced byJon CorBrick McArthurwas a camper onTotal Drama: Revenge of the Island, and was originally a member of theMutant Maggots, butswitchedto theToxic Rats. Brick is an army kid who enforces the "never leave a cadet behind" code as if his life depends on it. He respects his superiors to the fullest, saluting them and even complimenting Chef's disgusting meals, something onlyOwenhas done prior to him. According toDawn, Brick has a need to be dominated, but when necessary he can easily take control himself. Brick andJoarevery competitivewith each other. However, unlike many other contestants, Brick respects such skilled players. He also states his appreciation that they are on the same team. Brick can be tough, but he is also very sensitive and somewhat gullible. He has a habit of wetting himself and is also afraid of the dark. InRunaway Model, he cries when he unleashes a fashion disaster onSasquatchanakwa. The incident makes Brick want to attend fashion school, which he proudly announces inBrain vs. Brawn: The Ultimate Showdown, much to everyone's shock. Brick often competes with Jo.

characters.name: Bridgette
characters.description: BridgetteCharacter ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBlondeEye colorOlive GreenLabelThe Surfer GirlEpisode count41Total Drama Island(2007)TeamKiller BassMergeEliminationHide and Be SneakyPlacement10thTotal Drama ActionTeamN/AEliminationAlien Resurr-eggtionPlacementTied for 14thTotal Drama World TourTeamTeam VictoryEliminationAnything Yukon Do, I Can Do BetterPlacement16thAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipGeoffEzekiel(one-sided attraction, on his side)Alejandro(one-sided attraction, on her side, ended)FriendsBeth, Courtney, DJ, Geoff, Gwen, Harold, Leshawna, Lindsay, Owen, Sadie, TrentEnemiesAlejandro,Blaineley,Chris,Chef Hatchet,Duncan,Eva,Ezekiel(one-sided, on her side),HeatherFamilyMotherVoiced byKristin Fairlie Bridgettewas a camper inTotal Drama Islandas a member of theKiller Bass. She later returned as a castmate inTotal Drama Actionbut was not placed on a team due to herearly eliminationwithGeoff. She also qualified forTotal Drama World Touras a member ofTeam Victory. She is aco-hostof theTotal DramaAftermath. She was seen with the original contestants on ayachtin thefirst episodeinTotal Drama: Revenge of the Islandand had a cameo appearance inBackstabbers Ahoy!. Bridgette is a calm, compassionate surfer girl who loves animals as much as she loves the water. She is a vegetarian, finding animals to be her friends, not food. In contrast to her aquatic aptitude, Bridgette is known for being very clumsy on land, which often leads tosevereresults. Many aspects of Bridgette's character are revealed inBrunch of Disgustingness, when she refuses to give up her principles, no matter what. When she joins the remainingScreaming Gophersfemales, she faces one of her biggest challenges in getting them to work as a team. She believes in "building bridges, not walls", even when the competition is not a factor. Through Bridgette's spirit and determination, she always reaches her goal, whether it is getting her team to unite or anything else she sets her mind to.

characters.name: Bridgette (Total DramaRama)
characters.description: Bridgette (Total DramaRama)Character ProfileGenderFemaleHair colorBlondeEye colorGreenEpisode count54Additional InformationInteractionsFriendsBeth,Cody,Courtney,Duncan,Ella,Gwen,Harold,Izzy,Jude,Leshawna,Noah,OwenVoiced byKristin FarlieBridgetteis one of the children attendingHappy Tots Daycare Centre. Like her older self, Bridgette is a kind-hearted girl who is considered the most well behaved child at the daycare, causing the least amount of problems forChef Hatchet. She dislikes any sort of violence and tries to make sure her friends get along. InCluckwork Orange, Bridgette is reading a book by herself when suddenly out from nowhere,Jude's chicken, Nugget, attacks her for no reason with a pair of nunchucks and bombards her with eggs. Confused over what happened, Bridgette asks her friends what is going on. After Jude releases Nugget, Bridgette consoles him for making a tough decision.

characters.name: Brody
characters.description: BrodyCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBrownEye colorBlackEpisode count24Total Drama Presents: The Ridonculous RaceTeamThe Surfer Dudes withGeoffEliminationCa-NoodlingA Million Ways to Lose a Million DollarsPlacement1st/2ndAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipMacArthur(mutual attraction)FriendsCarrie,Devin,Dwayne,Don,Emma,Geoff,Junior,Kitty,MacArthur,SandersEnemiesJacques,JoseeFamilySisterVoiced byScott McCordBrodywas aTotal Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Racecontestant and one of thefinalistsas a member of The Surfer Dudes withGeoff. Brody is a high-energy person who stays positive and excited about everything he does. He loves the idea of exploring the world and is always ready for a new adventure. When things get tough, he doesn't get nervous; instead, he stays confident in his own abilities. He is incredibly tough and determined, often pushing through physical pain just to reach his goals. At his core, Brody cares deeply about honesty and playing by the rules. He is naturally kind and generous, frequently putting other people’s needs before his own and sharing whatever he has. Because he is so friendly and helpful, he goes out of his way to make sure everyone feels included. Brody is also very emotional; when he’s happy, he isn’t afraid to show it through hugs or even tears of joy. He is the type of person who would give up his own success if it meant making things fair for everyone else. However, his love for fun can sometimes be a distraction, causing him to lose focus when he’s having a good time.

characters.name: Bruno
characters.description: BrunoGenderMaleColorGrayEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceAftermath AftermayhemLast appearanceEvil Dread(exclusive clip)InteractionsFriendsBeth(one-sided on his side),Blaineley,BridgetteEnemiesGeoffBrunois a large graybearfrom Siberia. He acts as a guardian forBridgetteafter she treats his wounds and will attack anyone that comes close to her, including her boyfriend,Geoff. He debuts inAftermath Aftermayhemwhen Bridgette is seen on camera in Siberia. He is last seen in anexclusive clipofEvil DreadinTotal Drama All-StarswithBlaineley. InAftermath Aftermayhem, Bruno appears for the first time, where it appears as though he is attacking Bridgette, who was tricked into going to Siberia byBlaineley, and apparently destroys the camera. However, the bear is later shown crying over an injured paw, and Bridgette helps it with the injury. Bridgette calls the bear Bruno and insists upon staying in Siberia until his paw is healed. InHawaiian Style, when Bridgette surfs back to the new studio, Bruno is following her on a surfboard. Just when Geoff andBridgetteare about to kiss, Bruno punches Geoff, showing that he has become very possessive for Bridgette. After scolding the bear, Bridgette explains that Bruno has become possessive and will hurt anyone who comes within three feet of her. Even an attempt of touching Bridgette's elbow with his own causes Bruno to growl at Geoff.

characters.name: Bunny
characters.description: BunnyColorGray, Brown, WhiteEye colorBlackAppearancesFirst appearanceOpening sequenceLast appearanceDown and OutbackInteractionsFriendsCrimson,Courtney,DJ,Duncan,Ella,Ennui,Geoff,LindsayEnemiesBridgette,Cameron,Jacques,MacArthur,ScottBunnies, sometimes calledrabbits, are small, furry animals that have made numerous appearances throughoutTotal Dramaand itsspin-off series. Notable bunnies in the franchise include the two bunniesDJhad aspetsduring the course ofTotal Drama IslandandLoki, a black bunny adopted by theGothsinTotal Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Race. During the opening theme, DJ is seen relaxing in the forest being surrounded by a rabbit and several other animals. The moment of peace is disturbed when a dead fish fall nexts to them and the animals immediately attack him.DJ adopt a rabbit which he named Bunny inThe Sucky Outdoorswhile finding food for his team. DJ's bunny.

characters.name: Caleb
characters.description: CalebCharacter ProfileGenderMaleHair colorBlackEye colorTurquoiseLabelThe Smoking Hot PlayerEpisode count15Total Drama Island(2023)TeamFrogs of DeathEliminationMeet the VictimsPlacement16thTotal Drama Island(2024)TeamTeam Rat FaceMergeEliminationSoar LosersPlacementTied for 2ndAdditional InformationInteractionsRelationshipPriyaAndrea Willis(broken up)Bowie(one-sided attraction on Bowie’s side, ended)Emma(one-sided attraction on her side)FriendsEmma,PriyaEnemiesBowie, Julia, MKFamilyFather, Mother, GrandmotherVoiced byKwaku Adu-PokuCalebwas a camper onTotal Drama Island(2023)as a member of theFrogs of Death. He returned forTotal Drama Island(2024)as a member ofTeam Rat Faceand was one of thetworunner-ups of the season. Caleb is an incredibly physically gifted, kind, and generous person. He volunteers at a kitten orphanage, got an early acceptance intoMIT, and can bench 350lbs. He is described as a hot and emotionally mature character. He likes to help others if he can. He maintains a calm demeanor, and to begin with doesn't speak much. His looks captivate the other members of the cast, and he is viewed as a potential threat because of this. It’s possible that Caleb has trouble dropping grudges, as inMagma Cum Laude, he suggests the Wheel of Losers be named “the Wheel of People Who Never Even Got a Chance Because The Others Found Them Physically Intimidating,” which implies he never got over being voted offfirst. Total Drama Island (2024)reveals a more complex version of Caleb. He is able to play the game, deciding on trying to work out an alliance with the strongest player the show has ever seen,Priya, out of insecurity related to his placement last season and a desire to win. Eventually, he’d gain true feelings for Priya as well, showing that he is a romantic individual as well. Despite his positive traits, Caleb eventually becomesvery unpopularbecause of the misunderstanding about his alliance with Priya. Even so, he was still friendly to those who thought of him as a manipulator, therefore making most of these dislikes one-sided at best.

characters.name: Camel
characters.description: CamelColorBrownAppearancesFirst appearanceWalk Like An Egyptian - Part 1Last appearanceNone Down, Eighteen to Go - Part 2InteractionsFriendsIzzy,Laurie,MilesEnemiesChef Hatchet,Cody,Courtney,Heather Acamelis a humpbacked, long-necked mammal which is commonly found and domesticated in the desert regions of the world. It appears inthreeepisodesofTotal Drama World Tourandone episodeofTotal Drama Presents: The Ridonculous Race. The camel, along with the goat, isintroducedby Chris.
